params.name: Dolly Specimen
params.source: Fragment Crafting (31.5%), Lottery Machine (0.66%), Wishing (2.9%), Expert Scrolls (7.6%)
params.description:
On May 17, 1996, the cloning sheep Dolly was released to the public. Dolly's genetic mother is a Finn Dorset sheep and both her mitochondrial and surrogate mother are Scottish Blackface. Their recombined genes made it possible for Dolly to be born. Dolly lived for only 7 years but it has provided lots of data for scientific research, including a new direction for saving endangered animals and protecting the ecosystem. [Other clones] Macaque: 2000, Tetra, female
Cow: 2001, Alpha and Beta, …
